value.found_quote: A security-hardened container configuration might look like this: ... --security-opt seccomp=/path/to/seccomp-profile.json ... -v /path/to/code:/workspace:ro ... With `--network none`, the container has no network interfaces at all.
value.rationale: The page describes hardened container deployments for Claude Code/Agent SDK that use custom seccomp profiles (--security-opt seccomp=...), mounted volumes (-v /path/to/code:/workspace:ro), and network policies/controls (--network none with proxy, domain allowlists). This substantiates the claim of a custom container with network policies, mounted volumes, and seccomp profiles.
